'''âv-d-h''' ('''vadaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calumnize|calumnize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-d-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calumnize|calumnize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-d-h
|-
! Lemma
| vadaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vadahithi|vadahithi]] || [[word:vadahiji|vadahiji]] || [[word:vadahishi|vadahishi]] || [[word:vadahi|vadahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadahuthuth|vadahuthuth]] || [[word:vadahujuj|vadahujuj]] || [[word:vadahushush|vadahushush]] || [[word:vadah|vadah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadahuthu|vadahuthu]] || [[word:vadahuju|vadahuju]] || [[word:vadahushu|vadahushu]] || [[word:vadahu|vadahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadahufuth|vadahufuth]] || [[word:vadahufuj|vadahufuj]] || [[word:vadahufush|vadahufush]] || [[word:vadahuf|vadahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vadahethe|vadahethe]] || [[word:vadaheje|vadaheje]] || [[word:vadaheshe|vadaheshe]] || [[word:vadahe|vadahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadahothoth|vadahothoth]] || [[word:vadahojoj|vadahojoj]] || [[word:vadahoshosh|vadahoshosh]] || [[word:vadah|vadah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadahotho|vadahotho]] || [[word:vadahojo|vadahojo]] || [[word:vadahosho|vadahosho]] || [[word:vadaho|vadaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadahofoth|vadahofoth]] || [[word:vadahofoj|vadahofoj]] || [[word:vadahofosh|vadahofosh]] || [[word:vadahof|vadahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vadahĂŠthĂŠ|vadahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vadahĂŠjĂŠ|vadahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vadahĂŠshĂŠ|vadahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vadahĂŠ|vadahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadahathath|vadahathath]] || [[word:vadahajaj|vadahajaj]] || [[word:vadahashash|vadahashash]] || [[word:vadah|vadah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadahatha|vadahatha]] || [[word:vadahaja|vadahaja]] || [[word:vadahasha|vadahasha]] || [[word:vadaha|vadaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadahafath|vadahafath]] || [[word:vadahafaj|vadahafaj]] || [[word:vadahafash|vadahafash]] || [[word:vadahaf|vadahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vadahasha|vadahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govadahasha|govadahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivadahasha|gokivadahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vadahnĂŒsha|vadahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govadahnknĂŒsha|govadahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivadahnĂŒsha|gokivadahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vadahshĂ«sha|vadahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govadahnkshĂ«sha|govadahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivadahshĂ«sha|gokivadahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vadahrosha|vadahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govadahnkrosha|govadahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivadahrosha|gokivadahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vadahmusha|vadahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govadahnkmusha|govadahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadahmusha|gokivadahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vadahsherasha|vadahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govadahnksherasha|govadahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivadahsherasha|gokivadahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vadahngasha|vadahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govadahnkngasha|govadahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivadahngasha|gokivadahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vadahyasha|vadahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govadahnkyasha|govadahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivadahyasha|gokivadahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vadahyamasha|vadahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govadahnkyamasha|govadahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivadahyamasha|gokivadahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vadahnĂŒshĂ«sha|vadahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govadahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|govadahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivadahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokivadahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vadahnĂŒrosha|vadahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govadahnknĂŒrosha|govadahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivadahnĂŒrosha|gokivadahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadahnĂŒmusha|vadahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govadahnknĂŒmusha|govadahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadahnĂŒmusha|gokivadahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vadahshĂ«nĂŒsha|vadahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govadahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|govadahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivadahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokivadahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vadahshĂ«rosha|vadahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govadahnkshĂ«rosha|govadahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivadahshĂ«rosha|gokivadahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadahshĂ«musha|vadahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govadahnkshĂ«musha|govadahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadahshĂ«musha|gokivadahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vadahronĂŒsha|vadahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govadahnkronĂŒsha|govadahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivadahronĂŒsha|gokivadahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vadahroshĂ«sha|vadahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govadahnkroshĂ«sha|govadahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivadahroshĂ«sha|gokivadahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadahromusha|vadahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govadahnkromusha|govadahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadahromusha|gokivadahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vadahmunĂŒsha|vadahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govadahnkmunĂŒsha|govadahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivadahmunĂŒsha|gokivadahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vadahmushĂ«sha|vadahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govadahnkmushĂ«sha|govadahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivadahmushĂ«sha|gokivadahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vadahmurosha|vadahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govadahnkmurosha|govadahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivadahmurosha|gokivadahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vadah|vadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:vĂŠdĂŠh|vĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovadah|hovadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hovĂŠdĂŠh|hovĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovadah|hohovadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovĂŠdĂŠh|hohovĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒvadah|nĂŒvadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒvĂŠdĂŠh|nĂŒvĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvadah|nĂŒnĂŒvadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠdĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻvadah|nĂŻvadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻvĂŠdĂŠh|nĂŻvĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvadah|nĂŻnĂŻvadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠdĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvadah|luvadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luvĂŠdĂŠh|luvĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvadah|luluvadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvĂŠdĂŠh|luluvĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livadah|livadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:livĂŠdĂŠh|livĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivadah|lilivadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivĂŠdĂŠh|lilivĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovadah|kovadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kovĂŠdĂŠh|kovĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovadah|kokovadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovĂŠdĂŠh|kokovĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevadah|kevadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kevĂŠdĂŠh|kevĂŠdĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevadah|kekevadah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevĂŠdĂŠh|kekevĂŠdĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
